disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Insidious lower urinary tract symptoms over about a year — weak stream, hesitancy, increased frequency — never investigated, attributed by the patient to ageing
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the trouble passing urine.
How long have the urinary symptoms been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: For about a year my stream's been weak and I have to go more often, and it's hard to get started. I just thought it was old age and never got it looked at.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep, unremitting aching low back and pelvic pain, worse at night and at rest, not relieved by movement, heat or paracetamol, with acute worsening over 48 hours and inability to weight-bear
trigger_question_examples: Describe the back pain for me.
Is the pain worse at any particular time, or with movement or rest?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep constant ache low in my back and pelvis. It's worst at night when I'm lying still, moving doesn't help, and nothing touches it — not the heat pack, not the paracetamol. The last two days I can't even stand.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Unintentional weight loss of about 6 kg over two months with profound loss of appetite
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost any weight recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've dropped about 6 kilos in a couple of months without trying, and I've really gone off my food.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any changes in sexual function?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Well... yes, I've been having trouble with erections lately too.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient denies saddle/groin numbness, loss of bladder or bowel control, and sudden bilateral leg weakness on direct questioning (neurological deficit screen negative by history at this moment)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any numbness around your groin or back passage?
Any loss of control of your bladder or bowels, or sudden weakness in your legs?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that — no numbness between my legs, I haven't lost control of anything, and my legs aren't suddenly weak. It's the pain that stops me moving, not weakness.

trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any swelling anywhere?
Any changes in your legs or ankles?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My ankles have both gone a bit puffy over the last little while.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No haematuria — denies blood in the urine
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen any blood in your urine?
Is there any pain or burning when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, no blood in the urine that I've seen.
